scripts.build:firegrid: pnpm --filter @firegrid/substrate build && pnpm --filter @firegrid/client build && pnpm --filter @firegrid/runtime build
scripts.check: pnpm run build:firegrid && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
scripts.runtime: pnpm run build:firegrid && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.json src/runtime/main.ts
